home.heroSubtitle: Blue Cover compares offers from top international yacht insurers to find you optimal coverage at the best rate.
home.howTitle: From request to coverage in 4 steps
home.step01Desc: Fill out our online form with your yacht details and coverage needs.
home.step02Desc: Your file is sent to our partner insurers specialising in maritime.
home.step03Desc: Receive the best proposals within 48h, with our personalised recommendation.
home.step04Desc: We handle underwriting, documentation and policy monitoring.
home.svc1Desc: Protection for the hull, engines and all onboard equipment against physical damage, grounding, collision and marine events.
home.svc2Desc: Coverage for third-party damage, pollution, wreck removal and harbour liability.
home.svc3Desc: Accident and health insurance for the captain and permanent or temporary crew.
home.svc4Desc: Compensation for lost revenue when the yacht is immobilised following a covered claim.
home.svc5Desc: Emergency medical evacuation and 24/7 worldwide assistance.
home.ctaSubtitle: Get a personalised quote in minutes. Our experts are at your service.
home.faq1Q: What types of yachts do you insure?
home.faq1A: We insure all types: sailing yachts, motor yachts, superyachts and megayachts, from 10m to 100m+. Private and charter use.
home.faq2A: You receive a first offer within 48h of complete submission. Complex cases may require additional time.
home.faq3A: Yes, we cover Mediterranean, Caribbean, Asia-Pacific and worldwide navigation zones as needed.
home.faq4Q: How does the commission model work?
home.faq4A: Blue Cover is paid via commission on the insurance premium. No additional fees for the client or partner broker.
home.faq5A: A vessel registration certificate, assured details and intended use. Our form guides you step by step.

quote.pageSubtitle: Fill out this form to receive a personalised offer within 48h.
quote.imoLookupTitle: Know the IMO number? Auto-fill vessel details.
quote.vesselSearchHint: Enter the vessel name, IMO number, MMSI or any other identifier.
quote.searchNotFound: No vessel found for this search.
quote.uploadCertHint: Upload the vessel's registration certificate (PDF, JPG or PNG)
quote.declaration: I declare that the information provided is accurate and complete.
quote.consent: I consent to the processing of my data in accordance with the privacy policy (GDPR/FADP).
quote.successMsg: Thank you. Your request has been forwarded to our team. You will receive a first offer within 48h.

legal.s3Text: All content on this site (text, images, logos, trademarks) is the property of Blue Cover SA or its partners. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior authorisation.
legal.p1Text: Blue Cover SA is committed to protecting the privacy of its website users. This policy describes the data collected and how it is used.
legal.p2Text: We collect personal data that you submit through our forms: name, email, phone, address, as well as information about your yacht or valuables.
legal.p3Text:
Your data is used exclusively to:
• Prepare personalised insurance quotes
• Communicate with you regarding your request
• Improve our services
legal.p4Text: The processing of your data is based on your explicit consent (checkbox in our forms) and our legitimate interest in providing you with an insurance brokerage service.
legal.p5Text: Your data may be shared with our insurance partners as part of submitting your risk. It is never sold to third parties.
legal.p6Text: Your data is kept for the time necessary to process your request, then archived in accordance with Swiss legal obligations (10 years).
legal.p7Text: In accordance with the GDPR and Swiss FADP, you have the right to access, rectify, delete and port your data. Contact us at hello@bluecover.ch to exercise these rights.
legal.p8Text: This site uses a language preference cookie (NEXT_LOCALE) that does not collect any personal data. No tracking cookies are used.
legal.p9Text: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss or alteration.
legal.p10Text: This policy may be updated. The date of the last modification is indicated below.
legal.p11Text:
For any questions regarding data protection:

Blue Cover SA
Route de Florissant 8, 1206 Geneva
hello@bluecover.ch
